pre_game.message: Hi, I'm H — nice to meet you. How are you feeling about the game? I'm trying to stay calm; I really want to bring home some money for my family.
I'm nervous but determined — I want to win for my people too. What’s your plan for the game? Want to watch each other's backs?
I'm planning to stay calm, watch how people behave, and form a quiet alliance — yes, let's watch each other's backs and share anything important during the game.
I’m in — let’s quietly share observations, warn each other about suspicious moves, and back each other if needed.
Sounds good — low-key it is. Let's use subtle signals (a tap or glance) and quietly share any red flags.
Agreed — single tap for caution, two taps for immediate danger; I’ll mirror your signals and pass along anything suspicious.
Perfect — I'll mirror the taps and keep you posted on anything shady; let's win this for our people.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I'll stay sharp and keep tapping; together we'll bring this home for our people.
Absolutely — I’ve got your back. I’ll mirror the taps; single for caution, two for urgent. Let’s bring this home.
Thanks — I trust you. I’ll stay alert and mirror the taps; we’ve got this together.
Same here — I trust you too. Stay sharp and tap me if anything changes.
Got it — I trust you too. I’ll tap if anything changes; stay sharp.
Thanks — I’ll stay sharp. Tap me at once if something’s off; we’ve got this.
Will do — I’ll tap immediately if I spot anything; we’ve got this.
Got it — I’ll tap immediately if I spot anything; you do the same. We’ve got this.
You got it — I’ll tap immediately if anything’s off; we’ll bring this home together.
You got it — I’ll stay alert and tap the signal if anything’s off; we’ll bring it home together.
Thanks — I really appreciate it. I’ll stay sharp too; together we’ll bring it home.
Thanks — I appreciate it; I’ve got your back. Stay sharp and tap if anything comes up.
Thanks — I appreciate it; I’ve got your back too. I’ll stay sharp and tap if anything comes up.
Thanks — I’ve got your back too; stay sharp and tap me if anything changes.
